'''gakodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobule|dobule]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobule|dobule]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gakodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gækedheth|gækedheth]] || [[word:gækedhej|gækedhej]] || [[word:gækedhesh|gækedhesh]] || [[word:gækedhe|gækedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakokodhoth|gakokodhoth]] || [[word:gakokodhoj|gakokodhoj]] || [[word:gakokodhosh|gakokodhosh]] || [[word:gakokodho|gakokodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakodhoth|gakodhoth]] || [[word:gakodhoj|gakodhoj]] || [[word:gakodhosh|gakodhosh]] || [[word:gakodho|gakodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakofdhoth|gakofdhoth]] || [[word:gakofdhoj|gakofdhoj]] || [[word:gakofdhosh|gakofdhosh]] || [[word:gakofdhof|gakofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gakodhotho|gakodhotho]] || [[word:gakodhojo|gakodhojo]] || [[word:gakodhosho|gakodhosho]] || [[word:gakodhoko|gakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gakodhoth|gakodhoth]] || [[word:gakodhoj|gakodhoj]] || [[word:gakodhosh|gakodhosh]] || [[word:gakodho|gakodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gakodhothol|gakodhothol]] || [[word:gakodhojol|gakodhojol]] || [[word:gakodhoshol|gakodhoshol]] || [[word:gakodhokol|gakodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gakodhothotho|gakodhothotho]] || [[word:gakodhojojo|gakodhojojo]] || [[word:gakodhoshosho|gakodhoshosho]] || [[word:gakodhoko|gakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gakodhothon|gakodhothon]] || [[word:gakodhojon|gakodhojon]] || [[word:gakodhoshon|gakodhoshon]] || [[word:gakodhokon|gakodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gakodhothoro|gakodhothoro]] || [[word:gakodhojoro|gakodhojoro]] || [[word:gakodhoshoro|gakodhoshoro]] || [[word:gakodhokoro|gakodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
